title: Jump_Orion (OLD)
description: Parkour map based off "Jump maps" from TF2
body:
~~(Este es un projecto hispano, intentaré más adelante hacer una versión inglesa)~~
- ¡Hola! este es mi primer proyecto serio en cuanto a minecraft y "programación", mi idea es la de crear un jump map dentro de minecraft utilizando 0 mods (aparte de npcs y uno que otro cosmetico).

- Jump_Orion es un modpack/mapa de aventuras el cual reimagina el parkour tradicional utilizando las cargas de viento para poder avanzar de prueba a prueba, este mapa contiene por el momento 2 niveles completos, 1 nivel por terminar y 1 último nivel como promeza a futuro. Este mapa promete grandes retos y simples niveles para aquellos que recién están empezando a experimentar con este tipo mapas, al igual de varios secretos y logros esparcidos por el mapa ¿podrás encontrarlos todos?. 

~~(This is a non-english project, but i'll try to submit an english version later down the road)~~
- Hello! this is my first serious project regarding minecraft and "programming", my idea is to create a jump map inside minecraft using 0 mods (apart from npcs and one or another cosmetic).
Credits:

- Jump_Orion is a modpack/adventure map which reimagines the traditional parkour using wind charges to advance from challenge to challenge, this map contains for the moment 2 complete levels, 1 level to finish and 1 last level as a promise for the future. This map promises great challenges and simple levels for those who are just starting to experiment with this kind of maps, as well as several secrets and achievements scattered around the map, will you be able to find them all?

- Main Developer: [Walfenix](https://www.youtube.com/@Walfenix)
- Main Inspo: [Jump Academy team](https://jumpacademy.tf/members), [Jump Academy](https://jumpacademy.tf/) and [Portal 1]([https://store.steampowered.com/app/400/Portal/](https://store.steampowered.com/app/400/Portal/))
- Recommended texturepack: [Evees Teamfortress Craft v.0.1](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/evees-teamfortress-craft)
